name: The Golf Clubs
address: 7590 N Colonial Ave Suite A, Fresno, CA 93711
about: The Golf Clubs is a private, self-service indoor golf facility located off Palm and Nees. It utilizes Trackman 4 sensors, 4k projectors, and 14ft screens to provide a comprehensive golf simulation experience. The venue offers amenities like a lounge lobby, complementary snacks, and drinks, making it suitable for various players, from those looking to practice like the pros to those seeking a relaxing environment to play.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman 4 technology providing 26 data points and detailed swing analysis
Climate-controlled, private bays for a comfortable and focused practice session
Complementary snacks and drinks provided to all members and guests
Ability to play on over 280 different courses and participate in various golf games
Luxurious lounge area with TVs for relaxing before or after play

food_and_drink.notes: Complementary snacks provided to all members and guests
Complementary drinks provided to all members and guests

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line sensors providing 26 data points, multiple swing graphics, and video analysis
